publishedAbstract: * In an OCS 4.2 cluster, Object Buckets go into an Error state if `https://google.com`, `https://phonehome.noobaa.com` and `http://api.ipify.org/` are not accessible. * NooBaa buckets are stuck in `NOT_ENOUGH_HEALTHY_RESOURCES` mode. * NooBaas `noobaa-default-backing-store` is stuck in an Error state.
publishedTitle: In an OCS 4.2 cluster, Object Buckets go into an Error state if 'https://google.com', 'https://phonehome.noobaa.com' and 'http://api.ipify.org/' are not accessible.
